name: [BUG-001] ?in_stock=true filter is not implemented
description:
Regression: The product listing endpoint should support filtering
by availability (?in_stock=true), returning only products with
stock_quantity > 0. Currently the parameter is silently ignored.
descriptionHtml:
Regression: The product listing endpoint should support filtering
by availability (?in_stock=true), returning only products with
stock_quantity > 0. Currently the parameter is silently ignored.
statusMessage:
XFAIL BUG-001: GET /api/products/ should support ?in_stock=true filter — not yet implemented

AssertionError: Product 'Desk Lamp' (id=10) has stock=0 but was returned with ?in_stock=true filter
assert 0 > 0
